items.name: Cute Blonde Doll Face Hair
items.description:
Cute blonde hair with a sweet doll face and soft dark aesthetic. Perfect for emo, kawaii, soft goth and adorable avatar styles. Works great for cute feminine outfits and stylish looks. Works in R6 & R15.
